---
title: "The Missing Sovereign"
---

## The Missing Sovereign

**Author:** G. F. L.
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** London: SPCK

### Notes

The same author also published <i>The story of David and Jonathan : a Sunday book</i> by G. F. L., author of The missing sovereign, etc., etc. (London: Hatchard 1865).   He or she was a friend of Susanna Warren.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
